instruction: [Plugin Rollout Validation] Enable and validate a channel plugin before rollout messaging. Enable plugin 'slack', verify plugin list, schedule rollout checkpoint 'Plugin Rollout Validation execution block sync for San Francisco' at 2026-03-11T09:30, then send rollout note to coordinator@example.com.

solution_commands: calendar add-event --title 'Plugin Rollout Validation execution block sync for San Francisco' --start 2026-03-11T09:30

email send --to coordinator@example.com --subject 'Plugin Rollout Validation execution block update for San Francisco' --body 'Plugin Rollout Validation execution block: completed triage on meeting and captured next actions for San Francisco.'
